situation: audit-2026-07-08-043 derived_fix AE-M-002 pending. decision-observer.py:172 write_session_context() does read-modify-write on session JSON without lock. Concurrent Stop hooks (multi-instance Claude Code / hook retry) can lose updates. handle_user_prompt_submit has same pattern at line 207-221 (separate read of input_count then write_session_context re-reads).
action: Added fcntl.flock(LOCK_EX) around read-modify-write in write_session_context. Added optional transform callback parameter executed inside locked section to eliminate external pre-read TOCTOU. Refactored handle_user_prompt_submit to use transform=lambda e: {**e, 'input_count': e.get('input_count', 0) + 1} instead of separate read-increment-write. Verified with 10-process concurrent test: counter=10/10 after parallel writes (would be <10 without flock).
outcome_evidence: Commit 06e59d2 on auto/opt-hooks-1783388352. python3 syntax check passed. Cross-process concurrent test: 10 subprocess writes with flock produced counter=10 (no lost updates). cp-guard triggered on opt-hooks-1783203936 (prior phantom-fix divergence); used case-104 escape hatch direct wt commit on opt-hooks-1783388352. Push failed (origin 404 — autonomous-engine repo not found on code.alibaba-inc.com/xtool/); local-only branch per x-tool external fork pattern.
next_suggestion: Next pending: AE-L-001 (protocol-check env whitelist partial — 09374bb added --project-dir but os.environ still inherited fully). Then AE-L-002 (notify-phone ntfy 4KB truncate). After all 3 cleared, audit-cycle-state → cycle-complete triggers next full audit.

audit_findings.finding: write_session_context read-modify-write without lock — concurrent Stop hooks lose updates (TOCTOU)
audit_findings.remediation: fcntl.flock(LOCK_EX) around read-update-write; optional transform callback for pre-read-then-compute patterns
